reviews.review_title: This game taught me one thing
reviews.review_description: Find out for ones self! While reviews can be useful it's best to check out these thimgs for yourself. (Especially since one is able to get a no hassle refund)Taste tend to vary from person to person--The reviews were really bad but the graphics looked cool--well I love this game. As for the controls? They worked just fine. I think some folks just couldn't get the hang of it or the rules of engagement. I rank this app among my top 4 favorite
